[textmode.js](../../../../../index.md) / [media](../../../index.md) / [TextmodeVideo](../../TextmodeVideo.md) / duration

# Accessor: duration

## Get Signature

```ts
get duration(): number;
```

Total video duration in seconds.

### Returns

`number`
